zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Radcliffe於大約1281年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，她的父親William de Radcliffe14歲，母親Margaret De Hindley12歲。她與Henry de Worsley結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1354年在英國藍卡爾巴頓 武朋 易維爾享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Radcliffe于大约1281年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，她的父亲William de Radcliffe14岁，母亲Margaret De Hindley12岁。她与Henry de Worsley结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1354年在英国藍卡爾巴頓 武朋 易維爾享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Radcliffe was born about 1281, in Standish, Lancashire, England, her father, William de Radcliffe, was 14 and her mother, Margaret De Hindley, was 12. She married Henry de Worsley. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1354, in Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Radcliffe est née environ 1281, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Radcliffe, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Hindley, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Worsley. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1354, à Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Radcliffe um 1281 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Radcliffe 14 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Hindley 12. Sie hat Henry de Worsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1354 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Radcliffe è nata il circa 1281 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William de Radcliffe, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Hindley, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Worsley. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1354, nel Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Radcliffeが約1281年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父William de Radcliffeは14歳，母Margaret De Hindleyは12歳であった。Henry de Worsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1354年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートン ウプオン イルウエルで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Radcliffe(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Radcliffe(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Hindley(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 Henry de Worsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 랭카실르 바턴 업 웰에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Radcliffe nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Radcliffe, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Hindley, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Worsley. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1354, em Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Radcliffe родилась около 1281 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Radcliffe было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Hindley, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Worsley. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1354 г. в местности бартон упон ирвелл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Radcliffe nació aproximadamente 1281, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Radcliffe, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Margaret De Hindley, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Henry de Worsley. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1354, en Barton upon Irwell, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
